query_intent: For month sequence 1221-1232, list low-performing store-item pairs whose revenue is at most 10% of that store's average item revenue, including item/store descriptive fields.

dag_nodes.intent: Compute per-store average item revenue and per-store-item revenue over the same 12-month window, filter low-revenue pairs by the 10% threshold, and join store/item dimensions for output.
